member.name: M:MirrorNetwork.ForMainnet(ExecutorService)
member.summary: Create a mirror network for mainnet.
member.returns: the new mirror network for mainnet

member.name: M:MirrorNetwork.ForTestnet(ExecutorService)
member.summary: Create a mirror network for testnet.
member.returns: the new mirror network for testnet

member.name: M:MirrorNetwork.ForPreviewnet(ExecutorService)
member.summary: Create a mirror network for previewnet.
member.returns: the new mirror network for previewnet

member.name: M:MirrorNetwork.ForNetwork(ExecutorService,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.param: the arbitrary address for the network

member.name: M:MirrorNetwork.lock(this)
member.summary: Gets or sets the network names.
member.exception: When a thread is interrupted while it's waiting, sleeping, or otherwise occupied.

member.name: M:MirrorNetwork.GetRestBaseUrl
member.summary: Convenience to get the REST base URL from the next healthy mirror node.

member.name: M:MirrorNetwork.GetNextMirrorNode
member.summary: Extract the next healthy mirror node on the list.
member.returns: the next healthy mirror node on the list
member.exception: when a thread is interrupted while it's waiting, sleeping, or otherwise occupied
